rationale: B1.3 first run was degenerate because stage-1 alignment never converged (align loss held ~2.38 over only 200 steps) — projected vision tokens were noise. Scale alignment to 3000 steps on the full coco_caption_5k cache (5000 captions) so the projector actually learns the SigLIP→Qwen mapping before distillation; keep distill modest (qa_balanced) to isolate the alignment fix.

report.note: built; run runners/eval_student.py for same-path scores.
report.correction_note: Re-scored 2026-06-16 after fixing the decode bug (lm.generate(inputs_embeds=...) ignored image embeds). Floor-adjusted, trustworthy metrics: POPE balanced-acc 68.3 (>50 floor, real); MMBench 0.44 (at 0.50 floor); RealWorldQA uninformative at n=100. Earlier all-zero scores were a measurement bug.
